headline: Stock Market Today: Dow Up 250 As Nvidia Cuts Losses; Intuit Craters, But Rio Tinto, AI Firms Jam (Live Coverage)
summary: Stock Market Today: The Dow Jones index wavered Thursday after surprise jobless claims data. Nvidia stock fell despite strong earnings.

headline: Why The Valero Energy (VLO) Story Is Shifting As Analysts Rework Targets And Assumptions
summary: Valero Energy’s updated fair value estimate has shifted from US$247.33 to US$256.26, a move of about 3.6% that puts a finer point on where some models see upside. Recent analyst commentary, including target hikes into the low US$200s and a mix of rating changes, frames this new fair value against differing views on how much optimism is already in the stock. As you read on, you will see how these target moves fit into the evolving narrative and what to watch as new research comes out. Stay...
